title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open source tool that addresses memory limitations in Claude Code by creating knowledge graphs from large code bases. It generates more accurate, token-efficient responses without relying on RAG, enabling code understanding from minimal context.
